rationale: Educ. Code §22.904 governs mental health training for school employees and is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No textual or operational conflict exists.
quote: From funds appropriated for the purpose, the agency shall provide an allotment to each school district to assist the district in complying with this section.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns mental health training requirements and allotments; it does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
